mlb_player_props.method: Consensus-qualified player props using season, history, L10, and matchup signals as supporting inputs

key_factors: Active four-model consensus gate qualified publication
Season workload 6.55 K/9 over 7 appearances (7 starts)
Athletics lineup pitch-type K matchup neutral (2162 pitches): four-seamers 38% mix: 29% whiff, 31% K-ending PA; sliders 19% mix: 27% whiff, 23% K-ending PA
Pitcher recent arsenal four-seamers 38%, sliders 19%, cutters 19% with 23.4% whiffs/swing
picks.reason: The active four-model consensus gate qualifies this market at 68.1%; the All Time variant is retained as a supporting signal.
picks.research_details: History model over probability 70.5%; Over history hit rate 8-27 (29.6%)

key_factors: Active four-model consensus gate qualified publication
Season workload 6.78 K/9 over 23 appearances (7 starts)
Seattle Mariners lineup pitch-type K matchup vulnerable (1400 pitches): sinkers 24% mix: 15% whiff, 14% K-ending PA; sweepers 23% mix: 36% whiff, 37% K-ending PA
Pitcher recent arsenal sinkers 24%, sweepers 23%, splitters 22% with 22.1% whiffs/swing
picks.reason: The active four-model consensus gate qualifies this market at 65.7%; the All Time variant is retained as a supporting signal.
picks.research_details: History model over probability 28.8%; Under history hit rate 82-85 (96.5%)

nba_player_props.note: No NBA prop cleared the consensus publication gate.

wnba_3pm.method: WNBA 3PM props using 3PA volume, shrinkage-adjusted 3P%, season/history profiles, L10 form, venue, opponent, injury, and consensus gates

key_factors: WNBA3PM relaxed consensus floor active at 55% (15% lower).
Consensus gate rejected publication: three_pointers_made has not cleared 70%
Next-man-up redistribution from unavailable star(s): Olivia Miles
picks.reason: WNBA3PM publishes this in-house 3PM signal at 59.1% after lowering the WNBA3PM publication floor to 55%; full consensus remains unqualified (three_pointers_made has not cleared 70%).
